approved_command_preview: Completed-summary script smoke: run write_workflow_report.py with a synthetic workflow_run event and commit the repo-workflows report for readback.
command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path .github/tmp | Out-Null; $event = @{ workflow_run = @{ name='chatgpt-workflow-reporting-validation'; id='synthetic-completed-summary-20260507-001'; conclusion='success'; event='workflow_dispatch'; head_branch='main'; head_sha=$env:GITHUB_SHA; html_url='https://github.com/malwaredevil/dcoir-collector/actions/runs/synthetic-completed-summary-20260507-001'; run_attempt='1'; run_number='1'; created_at='2026-05-07T16:05:00Z'; updated_at='2026-05-07T16:05:30Z'; actor=@{login='chatgpt-smoke'}; repository=@{full_name='malwaredevil/dcoir-collector'} } }; $event | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 8 | Set-Content -Path .github/tmp/synthetic_workflow_run_event.json -Encoding UTF8; python .github/scripts/write_workflow_report.py workflow-run --event-json .github/tmp/synthetic_workflow_run_event.json --max-log-lines 20 --max-log-chars 4000; git config user.name 'github-actions[bot]'; git config user.email '41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com'; git add chatgpt_staging/status_reports/repo-workflows/chatgpt-workflow-reporting-validation/synthetic-completed-summary-20260507-001/workflow_report.md; git commit -m 'Smoke completed workflow summary metadata [skip ci]' || exit 0; git push; Write-Output 'completed summary script smoke committed'
